hero.title: Three technologies. The same technical demand.
hero.subtitle: We work with the three main turbine-based generation technologies. That breadth gives your company a single provider for multiple needs.

intro.title: One provider, multiple technologies
paragraphs: Most turbine service companies specialize in a single technology — hydraulic, steam, or gas. That forces plants with mixed generation to hire and coordinate multiple providers, multiplying contacts, contracts, and risks.
NRG covers all three technologies with the same technical team. For you, that means fewer providers, better coordination, and consistent quality across all interventions.

sectors.title: Hydroelectric power plants
sectors.shortDescription: Pelton, Francis, and Kaplan turbines. From small-scale run-of-river plants to large-capacity facilities.
sectors.fullDescription: We intervene on hydraulic turbines in low, medium, and high head plants. Our team has worked on both small hydroelectric plants (SHP) and large-capacity facilities, on public and private projects, in tropical, Andean, and European environments.

turbineTypes.name: Pelton
turbineTypes.description: High head, low flow. Bucket-wheel design with nozzle injectors.

turbineTypes.name: Francis
turbineTypes.description: Medium head, medium flow. The most common type worldwide.

turbineTypes.name: Kaplan
turbineTypes.description: Low head, high flow. Adjustable propeller-type runner blades.

turbineTypes.name: Bulb
turbineTypes.description: Very low head applications. Generator integrated in a submerged bulb.

sectors.title: Steam thermal power plants
sectors.shortDescription: Steam turbines in biomass, cogeneration, sugar mill, and thermoelectric plants.
sectors.fullDescription: Services for steam turbines across a wide range of industrial applications: cogeneration, biomass, sugar mills, refineries, pulp and paper mills, and large-scale thermoelectric plants. We handle impulse and reaction turbines, condensing and back-pressure configurations.

turbineTypes.name: Impulse
turbineTypes.description: Full steam expansion occurs in the fixed nozzles.

turbineTypes.name: Reaction
turbineTypes.description: Steam expansion distributed across fixed and moving blades.

turbineTypes.name: Condensing
turbineTypes.description: Exhaust steam is condensed for maximum energy extraction.

sectors.title: Gas thermal power plants
sectors.shortDescription: Gas turbines in simple and combined cycle, peaking plants, and distributed generation.
sectors.fullDescription: We service industrial and aeroderivative gas turbines in simple and combined cycle applications. This includes peaking plants, industrial cogeneration, and distributed generation. We work in close coordination with OEMs and oil & gas facilities.

turbineTypes.name: Industrial
turbineTypes.description: Heavy-duty, robust design for continuous operation.

turbineTypes.name: Aeroderivative
turbineTypes.description: Aircraft engine derived. High efficiency and fast start capability.

turbineTypes.name: Simple cycle
turbineTypes.description: Gas turbine only. Ideal for peaking and backup generation.

turbineTypes.name: Combined cycle
turbineTypes.description: Gas turbine + steam turbine. Maximum thermal efficiency.

crossover.title: What plants with mixed generation gain

items.title: A single technical point of contact
items.description: Reduces the administrative friction of coordinating separately specialized providers.

items.title: Consistency across interventions
items.description: The same protocols, quality standards, and reporting formats for all your units, regardless of technology.

items.title: Contracting economies of scale
items.description: Multi-technology framework agreements that reduce transaction costs and ensure availability.

cta.title: Do you operate a plant with mixed technology?
cta.subtitle: Tell us which units you run. We will propose a comprehensive service scheme with a single technical team.
